spicy-0.0.1.description:
See info page: https://github.com/Alchav/Archipelago/blob/spicy-mycena-64/worlds/sm64ex_spicy/docs/en_Spicy%20Mycena%2064.md

Use this repo to build your sm64ex game executable: https://github.com/Alchav/sm64ex

This is minimally tested, please report any issues! There will probably be some :)
spicy-0.0.1.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64, version 0.0.1

spicy-0.0.2.description:
- Music Shuffle option added.
- BoB should not get swapped out for another level when Area Randomizer is off.
- Castle Cannon renamed to Cannon Unlock - Castle.
spicy-0.0.2.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64, version 0.0.2

spicy-0.0.3.description: - Fixes logic issue with Wing Mario over the Rainbow entrance logic
spicy-0.0.3.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64, version 0.0.3

spicy-0.0.4.description:
You must re-build sm64ex if you have an older version!

## New Features

- Added Purple Switches as unlockable progression items.
- Added Wet-Dry World Water Level Diamonds as unlockable progression items.
- Added Tick Tock Clock Spinners as unlockable progression items.
- Added Mario's Hat as an optional item that can be shuffled.
- Added an unlock item for Bowser in the Fire Sea.

## New Randomization Options

- All level-feature shuffles that were not originally act-specific features can now be toggled through YAML options.
- Rolling Logs now shuffles the Tall, Tall Mountain Rolling Log in addition to the Lethal Lava Land Rolling Log, and can now be shuffled as either a single global item or individual level-specific items, and now includes the Rolling Log in 
- Purple Switches can now be shuffled as either a single global item or individual level-specific items.
- Checkerboard Platforms can now be shuffled as either a single global item or individual level-specific items.

## Coin Star Changes

- Coins Star checks have been renamed from "100 Coins" to "Coins Star."
- Coins Stars are now always included and can no longer be disabled.
- Added YAML options to configure the Coins Star requirement for each main course individually.

## Level Changes

- Defeating Big Boo in Big Boo's Haunt no longer spawns the staircase star.
- The Big Boo star has been moved to the ground floor near the staircase.

## Interface Improvements

- Redesigned the pause menu to display per-level feature unlocks and Coins Star coin requirements.
- Moved the HUD coin counter to the top-right corner of the screen.
- Simplified file select progress displays.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed music shuffle.
spicy-0.0.4.title: SM64: Spicy Mycena 64, version 0.0.4
